title: F to Fart
description: This mod lets you trigger a fart by pressing the "F" key. It plays a fart sound and displays a visual fart effect. A fun mod for humorous moments, especially in multiplayer sessions.
body:
With this mod, pressing the "F" key triggers a funny fart sound and a visual fart effect in the game. It adds a humorous element to your Minecraft experience, allowing you to prank your friends and lighten the mood.

What changes with the mod:

- Fart sound and effect: When you press "F", a fart sound is played, and a visual fart cloud appears around your character.
- Pranking your friends: Perfect for messing with your friends in multiplayer mode. Imagine sneaking up behind them and hitting the "F" key to make them wonder what just happened!
- Fun moments: Adds some silly fun to the game, making Minecraft even more entertaining with unexpected fart moments.
